signals.headline: Germany Joint Economic Forecast Spring 2026 confirms energy price shock from Iran war driving 2026 inflation to 2

signals.headline: Bank of Korea April 10 holds rates at 2
signals.raw: Bank of Korea April 10 holds rates at 2.5%, signals mid-to-high 2% inflation and GDP below prior 2.0% forecast due to Middle East conflict | YES | MED confidence**[4]
